heading: Spina bifida conditions covered
label: 1802 Spina bifida conditions covered
text: This subchapter applies with respect to all forms and manifestations of spina bifida except spina bifida occulta.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1802 was renumbered .section 3702 of this title
